text: Corn tortillas filled with shredded chicken or cheese, bathed in guajillo chile sauce and topped with potatoes, carrots, cream, and cheese. Colorful, comforting, and deeply traditional.
Thick corn pockets stuffed with chicharrón crumbs, cheese, or beans, grilled and served with salsa and nopales. A rustic, satisfying snack found in markets and roadside stands.
Sweet corn tamales made from tender maize, steamed in husks and served with condensed milk or fruit sauce. Soft, fragrant, and beloved during local festivities.
